ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Mar-10-2014 Granted Per Written Order

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Feb-24-2014 Continued To Mar-10-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Order Approving Settlement And Release Agreement Re: A Secured Note
Off Calendar Sep-17-2013 Granted Per Written Order

Petition For Order Approving Settlement And Release Agreement Re: A Secured Note
Off Calendar Sep-03-2013 Continued To Sep-17-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For An Order To Declare A Default And Initiate Foreclosure Proceedings And To Appoint Receiver To Collect Rents
Off Calendar Jan-10-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Yuji Mitani for and with Terunori Shizuya (Petitioner). Brian Davis for Jaime Gutierrez (Respondent).

The Court indicated that this is not a probate dispute, it is a civil dispute and the Respondent is not a party to the Estate. The Court granted the Petition in part and authorized the administrator to declare default and initiate a civil proceeding. Mr. Mitani to prepare an order and provide it to Mr. Davis for review.

Judge: Peter Busch. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.

Petition For An Order To Declare A Default And Initiate Foreclosure Proceedings And To Appoint Receiver To Collect Rents
Off Calendar Nov-05-2012 Continued To Nov-26-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Jul-21-2011 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Yuji Mitani for Petitioner.

Mr. Mitani stated that he tried to get all of the Beneficiaries to waive bond but that one refused and proposed that the proceeds from the note be placed into a blocked account. The Court granted the Petition for Letters of Administration (subject to review of the order). Bond to be posted in the amount of $320,000.00.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.
